ip_outcome_note: Card name, special trait (Saiyan / Dragon Ball Minus Saga era), and frontmatter character field all explicitly name Gine. Visual: short dark hair, teal Saiyan battle outfit with pink accents, gentle expression in a rocky outdoor setting — matches her canonical design from Dragon Ball Minus (2014) and Dragon Ball Super: Broly (2018). IP verified.

trivia_bullets.text: BT3-087 is a Common Battle card from Cross Worlds (DBS-B03), the third main booster set, released March 2018 — the same year Dragon Ball Super: Broly canonized the Dragon Ball Minus character roster including Gine. [WebSearch: bleedingcool.com Cross Worlds checklist; toywiz.com set overview]
sources: WebSearch: Dragon Ball Super Cross Worlds BT3 release overview

trivia_bullets.text: Yellow Battle card, power 5000, energy cost 2. Key ability: if a <Bardock> card is in the player's Battle Area or Leader Area, Gine can be played from hand without paying her energy cost — mechanically encoding her canon bond with Bardock. She also carries Blocker, allowing her to intercept attacks on other cards. Era trait: Dragon Ball Minus Saga. [WebSearch: bigorbitcards.co.uk BT3-087 snippet]
sources: WebSearch: Gine BT3-087 Cross Worlds card details

trivia_bullets.text: Gine was introduced by Akira Toriyama in the March 2014 issue of Saikyō Jump as part of Dragon Ball Minus: The Departure of the Fated Child, then animated in Dragon Ball Super: Broly (2018). The film established Dragon Ball Minus as the official canon origin for Goku, replacing the 1990 Dragon Ball Z: Bardock - The Father of Goku TV special. [WebSearch: ComicBook.com — Dragon Ball Super Broly Confirms Minus Canon; CBR — Everything We Know About Goku's Mother, Gine]

Gine is canonically a low-class Saiyan warrior who accepted she was not suited for battle and transferred to a meat distribution center. Her mutual affection with Bardock was considered aberrant in Saiyan culture. Toriyama credited her gentle nature as the source of Goku's empathy. [WebSearch: CBR / ComicBook.com Gine character profile]
